summary: Full E2E testing of BUILD 1 RODDOS: catalogo_motos collection, REST endpoints, and Catálogo de Motos tab in /configuracion. All 9 backend tests pass. All frontend flows pass: tab visible, table renders, inline edit, toggle active, modal create with validation.

test_results.GET /api/settings/catalogo: PASS - Returns Sport 100 and Raider 125 with all required fields (id, modelo, marca, costo, pvp, cuota_inicial, matricula, planes.P39S/P52S/P78S, activo)
test_results.POST /api/settings/catalogo: PASS - Creates new model with all fields, persists to DB (verified via GET)
test_results.PUT /api/settings/catalogo/{id} price: PASS - Updates PVP correctly, persists to DB
test_results.Tab Catálogo de Motos visible: PASS - data-testid='tab-catalogo' found with text 'Catálogo de Motos'
test_results.Table columns: PASS - Modelo, Costo, PVP, CI, Matrícula, P39S, P52S, P78S, Activo, Acciones all present
test_results.Inline edit activation: PASS - Pencil button (2nd button in row) activates 8 input fields in the row
test_results.Guardar button saves changes: PASS - PUT sent, toast 'Cambios guardados', inputs disappear, table refreshes
test_results.Toggle activo/inactivo: PASS - First button in row toggles active state with toast confirmation
test_results.Agregar Modelo modal: PASS - Opens with Modelo, Marca, Costo, PVP, Cuota Inicial, Matrícula, P39S/P52S/P78S fields
test_results.Modal validation: PASS - Empty modelo shows toast 'El nombre del modelo es obligatorio'
test_results.Create model from modal: PASS - TEST_FrontEnd Moto created, appears in table (4 modelos)

action_items: Cleanup test data: DELETE TEST_Moto Prueba and TEST_FrontEnd Moto from catalogo_motos collection (left from testing)
critical_code_review_comments: Settings.tsx is 1063 lines - exceeds 700-line guideline. Consider splitting CatalogoTab, SecurityTab, AuditTab, WebhooksTab, MercatelyTab into separate files.

PUT /settings/catalogo uses `if v is not None` to filter updates, which means setting a value to 0 will be ignored (falsy but valid). Should use `if v is not None` correctly - currently it does use is not None so it's fine.
No mutex testing possible via UI (loanbook.py mutex tested by code review only)
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_Moto Prueba (via backend test) and TEST_FrontEnd Moto (via frontend test) in catalogo_motos. Both inactive.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All BUILD 1 RODDOS features work end-to-end. catalogo_motos has Sport 100 + Raider 125 + 2 test entries. Settings.tsx tab 'Catálogo de Motos' fully functional (inline edit, toggle, add modal). Cleanup test data if needed.
